chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-128 of 2026 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2026 Mr. Saifullah Soomro, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy A.G Pakistan along with respondent No.5 Ghulam Ali Tunio Manager (P&D) SEPCO Sukkur and Kashif Gulzar Shaikh XEN Rohri ************** Mian Zaheer Muhammad Babar, Advocate, has filed the vakalatnama on behalf of Respondents No. 4 to 8, along with comments/objections on behalf of the said respondents. Respondents No. 5 and 6 are present in person and submit that, as per NEPRA policy, the required electricity load of 350 KVA is to be sanctioned. However, in the year 2010, a load of 50 KVA was approved, which is contrary to the policy. However, they undertake to provide the electricity subject to NEPRA policy, upon payment of the demand notice by the petitioner for the remaining 300 KVA. Keeping in view the above, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondents to provide electricity to the petitioner upon payment for the remaining 300 KVA and completion of the formalities required by law. J U D G E J U D G E M.Ali*
